label: RETINAL_NEURAL_PROGENITOR
rationale: HDCA assigned CL:0002259 (neuroepithelial stem cell) but its CL definition is glial-precursor-focused and not retinal. Better fit: CL:0002672 narrow (HDCA RNP is a committed PAX6+/LHX2+ neurogenic-biased subset of the broader RPC class). NTR candidate for "retinal neurogenic-committed progenitor".
